description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a combination of blue, brown, gray, and orange panels made from various materials including fabric, suede, and synthetic leather. The shoe has a rounded toe, a padded collar, and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The lacing system uses standard criss-cross laces with blue and white speckled laces threaded through metal eyelets. The midsole is primarily white with orange accents, and the outsole appears to be made of rubber for traction. The interior is padded for comfort, and the overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for urban environments. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A multi-colored athletic sneaker with blue, brown, gray, and orange panels, featuring a padded collar, pull tab, and criss-cross lacing. The shoe has a sporty, modern design with a white and orange rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue toe, brown midsection, orange heel accent, and white midsole with visible stitching and layered materials.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded blue toe, criss-cross lacing, and orange tongue accent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brown and blue panels, orange midsole accent, and layered construction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pull tab, padded collar, orange heel accent, and brown suede heel panel.
